prompt: Perform a focused security review. Prioritize auth, secret handling, command execution boundaries, and injection risks. Report only high-signal issues with file paths and concrete fixes.
Audit test coverage and failure modes. Identify missing edge cases, flaky patterns, and untested critical paths. Suggest exact tests to add with clear naming.
Review performance hotspots and resource usage. Focus on expensive loops, repeated I/O, unnecessary allocations, and blocking calls. Propose measurable, low-risk optimizations.
